title: urostachys selago
intro: Urostachys selago is a species of flowering plant in the family Lycopodiaceae, commonly known as a club moss due to its unique, club-like spore-bearing structures. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Consuming Urostachys selago has been associated with several health benefits, including improved immune function, reduced stress levels, and enhanced cognitive function. Urostachys selago can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
